film.title: What Just Happened
film.overview: During the course of an ordinary week in Hollywood, movie producer Ben must navigate his way through shark-infested waters as he struggles to complete his latest projects. A demanding studio boss demands extensive changes to a movie starring Sean Penn, while another chief won't greenlight a project unless star Bruce Willis shaves his beard. Meanwhile, Ben tries to reconcile with his wife and maintain a relationship with his young daughter.

dialogues.dialogue: I can't believe this.  After one bad screening? Yoυ gotta be kidding me.  Son of a b***h, I can't-- People have no shame.  Rυthless p****s.  -Who's moving in here? -What?

-All right? -All right. I'm here to support you.  Look, all I'm saying is' and I don't mean to flog it' but' you know.  I think you should be proud. We went out on a limb on this one.  I am proud.  Yeah, well, it's not jυst about the money' is it?

Look, all I'm saying is' and I don't mean to flog it' but' you know.  I think you should be proud. We went out on a limb on this one.  I am proud.  Yeah, well, it's not jυst about the money' is it?  We already got the money' now we gotta get the money back.
